data_release.title: DeepShapeOpt paper data package
data_release.notes: Large data and trained models are intentionally stored outside GitHub.

environment_variables.DEEPSHAPEOPT_DATA_DIR: Root directory containing downloaded meshes and datasets.
environment_variables.DEEPSHAPEOPT_MODEL_DIR: Root directory containing trained DeepSDFStruct model checkpoints.
environment_variables.DEEPSHAPEOPT_RESULTS_DIR: Root directory for generated reconstruction and optimization results.

artifacts.publication_review: Confirm this mesh has explicit publication clearance before release.
